rationale: In the citing paper, Nevskaya and Albuquerque (2019) is used once as methodological background to support the general appeal of continuous-time modeling over discrete-time intervals. The citing article does not build its hypotheses, constructs, or empirical setting from that study, and it does not reuse the cited paper's specific structural components (e.g., habit/satiation or intervention counterfactuals). The citation serves as precedent-level support rather than a direct building block of the contribution.
